Class-Barbarian 20 — Male Human Barbarian: 20
Strength: 20 (+5) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Constitution: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 604997/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 300/600
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Fast Movement: +10 Speed; heavy armor negates
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Primal Champion: +4 Strength/+4 Constitution
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Indomitable Might: Scores a minimum of 20 on Strength checks
Rage: Has advantage on Strength checks during rage
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Barbarian (Barbarian Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Dimensional Travel; Grappler; Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Barbarian Features: Animal Speaker; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Aspect Of The Wilds; Barbarian Subclass; Battering Roots; Branches Of The Tree; Brutal Strike; Danger Sense; Divine Fury; Epic Boon; Extra Attack; Fanatical Focus; Fast Movement; Feral Instinct; Frenzy; Improved Brutal Strike; Indomitable Might; Instinctive Pounce; Intimidating Presence; Mindless Rage; Nature Speaker; Path Of The Berserker; Path Of The Wild Heart; Path Of The World Tree; Path Of The Zealot; Persistent Rage; Power Of The Wilds; Primal Champion; Primal Knowledge; Rage Of The Gods; Rage Of The Wilds; Rage; Reckless Attack; Relentless Rage; Retaliation; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, Survival); Travel Along The Tree; Unarmored Defense; Vitality Of The Tree; Warrior Of The Gods; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons); Zealous Presence Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Barbarian Subclass: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Aspect Of The Wilds: At the end of a long rest, gains a choice of 60' Darkvision or a 40' climb or swim Speed
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +7 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +5 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +7
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Insight; Perception; Religion; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Common; Draconic; Giant
Skill Notes:
Primal Knowledge: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, Survival)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Primal Knowledge: Can use Strength for Acrobatics, Intimidation, Perception, Stealth, and Survival during rage
Combat
Hit Points: 87 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+11 1d8+5 S [2h d10]; Topple); Longbow (+7 1d8+1 P R150/600; Slow); Unarmed Strike (+11 1+5 B); Whip (+11 1d4+5 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Improved Brutal Strike: Has increased Brutal Strike effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +5
Strength Damage Adjustment: +5
Unarmored Defense: +1 Armor Class in no armor
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Battering Roots: Has a +10' reach with heavy and versatile melee weapons and can use the Push and Topple mastery properties with them in addition to their usual mastery properties
Boon Of Dimensional Travel: Can teleport 30' after attacking or casting
Branches Of The Tree: R30' While raging, can use a reaction at the start of a creature's turn to teleport it to a spot adjacent to self and to reduce its speed to 0 until the end of its turn (save DC 19 Strength negates)
Brutal Strike: Can forego Reckless Attack advantage on a Strength-based attack to inflict +2d10 HP weapon damage and 2 choices of: disadvantage on the target's next save and loss of opportunity attacks until the start of the next turn; a +5 bonus to the next attack on the target before the start of the next turn; a 15' push, optionally moving with the target; -15 Speed until the start of the next turn
Divine Fury: First hit each turn during rage inflicts +1d6+10 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Feral Instinct: Has advantage on initiative
Frenzy: First attack during Reckless Attack inflicts +4d6 HP
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Instinctive Pounce: Can move 20' when entering rage
Intimidating Presence: R30' Can use a bonus action to inflict frightened (DC 19 Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) on targets for 1 min once per long rest; can expend uses of Rage for additional uses
Persistent Rage: Can recover all uses of Rage during initiative once per long rest and can continue raging without taking any action
Power Of The Wilds: Rage gives a choice of: a 40' fly Speed when unarmored; adjacent foe disadvantage when attacking anyone but self; melee hits inflict prone on a Large or smaller foe
Rage Of The Gods: When entering rage, can gain a 40' fly Speed, resistance to necrotic, psychic, and radiant damage, and reactions that expend a use of Rage to restore 20 hit points to a creature within 30' when it is taken to 0 hit points, for 1 min once per long rest
Rage Of The Wilds: Rage gives a choice of: resistence to damage other than force, necrotic, psychic, and radiant; a Disengage and a Dash when entering rage and as a bonus action each rd during rage; ally advantage on attacks vs. foes adjacent to self
Rage: Can enter a rage as a bonus action, gaining +4 damage with Strength weapons, for 1 rd (attacking, forcing a save, or using a bonus action each rd extends the rage for up to 10 min) 6 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest; heavy armor ends the rage
Reckless Attack: Can suffer foe advantage on attacks to gain advantage on Strength attacks until the start of the next turn
Retaliation: Can use a reaction to make a melee attack on a successful adjacent attacker
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Travel Along The Tree: Can teleport 60' when entering rage and as a bonus action each rd during rage; can instead teleport 150' along with 6 willing targets within 10' once per rage
Vitality Of The Tree: Entering rage gives self 20 temporary hit points and, each turn, allows giving a creature within 10' 4d6 temporary hit points until the end of the rage
Warrior Of The Gods: Can use a bonus action to regain hit points from a pool of 7d12 that refills after a long rest
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen kinds of proficient melee weapons
Zealous Presence: R60' Can use a bonus action to give 10 targets advantage on attacks and saves until the start of the next turn once per long rest; can expend uses of Rage for additional uses
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +7; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +11; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Danger Sense: Has advantage on Dexterity saves
Fanatical Focus: Can reroll a failed save with a +4 bonus once per rage
Mindless Rage: Has immunity to charmed and frightened during rage
Rage: Has advantage on Strength saves and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage during rage
Relentless Rage: Can make a DC 10 Constitution save to retain 40 hit points when brought to 0 hit points during rage; additional uses each add 5 to the DC until a short rest
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 2; C: 1; D0: 2; D: 1; W0: 2; W: 1 Attack: Barbarian: +7; C: +7; D: +7; W: +8 Spell DC: Barbarian: 15; C: 15; D: 15; W: 16
Spells:
Beast Sense (Barbarian2 [Animal Speaker] Divi): Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Commune With Nature (Barbarian5 [Nature Speaker] Divi): Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Speak With Animals (Barbarian1 [Animal Speaker] Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Magic Notes:
Animal Speaker: Can cast Beast Sense and Speak With Animals as rituals
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Nature Speaker: Can cast Commune With Nature as a ritual
Rage: Cannot cast or concentrate on spells during rage
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 4 allocated
